_doc: Distributor-driven carries (docs/specs/logo-r2-keystone.md sibling). A store's product list is DERIVED at serve-time from its chain's distributor(s) — union of each distributor's products. Lives in code so it's identical on every environment (Admin/staging/prod) and auto-applies to any newly-imported store, no per-store stamping. Chain keys must match chains.name EXACTLY. Add a chain here once we confidently know its distributor; unmapped chains fall back to their stored carries column.
_labels_doc: labels = DISPLAY-ONLY distributor name(s) for the Admin 'Distro' field. Unlike `chains`, these do NOT derive carries — the store keeps its stored product list. Use for chains whose distributor we know but whose products were curated by hand (Excell accounts, etc.).
